name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…” 😮
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952265:J736rYGcN:m:1:3374012347:00F85A70A8376DCDED6F247DE27A1F91:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952265:J736rYGcN:m:1:3374012347:00F85A70A8376DCDED6F247DE27A1F91:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952265:J736rYGcN:m:1:3374012347:00F85A70A8376DCDED6F247DE27A1F91:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952265:J736rYGcN:m:1:3374012347:00F85A70A8376DCDED6F247DE27A1F91:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---

|
---

Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61952265:J736rYGcN:m:1:3374012347:00F85A70A8376DCDED6F247DE27A1F91:r) **

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: 🦃 Happy Thanksgiving 🦃
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
I want to wish you and your loved ones all the best today!
| | | Friend, I’m glad to reach you this morning – I'm sure you’re gearing up for a busy day, so I’ll keep this brief.

I just wanted to take a moment out to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving!
---
---
I’ve spent a considerable amount of time today reflecting on all I have to be thankful for, as we celebrate this special holiday and look ahead to the future.

I am incredibly blessed with a wonderful family, amazing friends, and good health.

I’m thankful for the peace, love, and joy our risen Savior brings to our lives, and for the freedom and liberty that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world.

And I’m thankful beyond words for YOU, Friend.

Together, strong and united, we fought hard this year and got the job done to protect this seat and take back the House. Now, we’re getting right to work in Washington to hold Joe Biden accountable and rein in the Democrats’ disastrous radical-left agenda in 2023.

Thank you again, as always, for being part of the team.

I hope you and your loved ones enjoy a great Thanksgiving today!

\- Troy E. Nehls
---

subject: Thankful
body:

I AM Thankful for my family and friends
I AM Thankful for your support
I AM Thankful to be your voice in congress.

Anthony

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congress[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/ElissaSlotkin_bigLogo.png]
Friend,
Happy Thanksgiving!
I’m writing to you as I travel abroad on a CODEL — or congressional delegation — with other Members of Congress.
A quick note as Thanksgiving comes to an end:
Today, I participated in the yearly tradition where members of the Veterans Affairs Committee serve a Thanksgiving meal to our troops serving abroad.
Specifically, I was honored to share a meal with our active duty military and guardsmen from Michigan — Americans whose dedicated service gives us the privilege of sharing holidays with our families.
As you wrap up today and enjoy the last of the day's food, football, or whatever your traditions may be, don’t forget to honor those who are fighting for our freedoms, serving us every day, far from home.
Happy Thanksgiving,
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We have two tasks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was recently in Georgia because it’s THAT important. You should help, too. |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9e6302269aad468b898d807fc5a1c240&_e=6pNn8MTQEgf4JiEQ-5ysVFrapqAvFvCyV7-zfRTU_MYd4OzBK7upTfdaJCN5ENTNPJEQ_u2AzFbSps0IaEHNdVy2MiRHw-pv_pFxNHUpBIKpayFRlWyVYLgXbFG0DxXgatFyaJR89UGG45A1nJfet3Xh9AgI8_mC9zEPkONCMTX2dcvqqjzs1gRz1HsVF3_i7egQIHh0Un28Lg0T6ISDUD7PI15_upvTJXMM2w_k95OsOBM63j7kLocQ_SXOifrkLlYLtNSMsGhF35T2iMtjbCso_9DACkkk5OjIAWu5BUlFqKOFO4Jhq6xYb8x_RfQecjSITeXoLwUuqmqRXispKBTYB3b293gtgVBnGvSqzadLaMEV--xStfr5ehnV0KVFmTBZG_CRTNb4I4USHuInL-InqNsBn8KmYy9wV2uGciiCpoOl3PKO3BavkwsXt-XO)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Fellow American._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9e6302269aad468b898d807fc5a1c240&_e=6pNn8MTQEgf4JiEQ-5ysVFrapqAvFvCyV7-zfRTU_MYd4OzBK7upTfdaJCN5ENTNPJEQ_u2AzFbSps0IaEHNdVy2MiRHw-pv_pFxNHUpBIKpayFRlWyVYLgXbFG0DxXgatFyaJR89UGG45A1nJfet3Xh9AgI8_mC9zEPkONCMTX2dcvqqjzs1gRz1HsVF3_i7egQIHh0Un28Lg0T6ISDUD7PI15_upvTJXMM2w_k95OsOBM63j7kLocQ_SXOifrkLlYLtNSMsGhF35T2iMtjbCso_9DACkkk5OjIAWu5BUl8se2_8lW1MbnolsD0nXRyevQxCpOikJMNfHCY1AW1S2y9Pn3Lfv7Zoph5Nf9DP6cccqVsokfpBtLZRfecPj8WO-vKyKkr1p3dZLYAguABEjRz1tcfEl2-9TajKk-oJ555KegpcA6eM4O-WUQz4BQz)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $5, $10, or $34.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9e6302269aad468b898d807fc5a1c240&_e=6pNn8MTQEgf4JiEQ-5ysVFrapqAvFvCyV7-zfRTU_MYd4OzBK7upTfdaJCN5ENTNPJEQ_u2AzFbSps0IaEHNdVy2MiRHw-pv_pFxNHUpBIKpayFRlWyVYLgXbFG0DxXgatFyaJR89UGG45A1nJfet3Xh9AgI8_mC9zEPkONCMTX2dcvqqjzs1gRz1HsVF3_i7egQIHh0Un28Lg0T6ISDUD7PI15_upvTJXMM2w_k95OsOBM63j7kLocQ_SXOifrkLlYLtNSMsGhF35T2iMtjbCso_9DACkkk5OjIAWu5BUlkZMnViouIbQEei40F2-MBfcm7o6WWbMeQm8AHptALE2kROje7JZMrplHJOerymJ_RyWk44Tisb8nNoIqOufVMXXeP15pMLhbl1FZ_5to0nHHDLX8rA0knchyB1Tc-xWQk-gEsaTG6Mml4r-Job9W9)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Here's what I'm thankful for.
body:
(Hint: It's all of you!)
Happy Thanksgiving, friend!It's finally that time of the year to set aside your day-to-day thoughts, worries, and struggles to remember who and what you're grateful for.**Here's what I'm grateful for: my family, my state, and my supporters who've stood by me through such a tough election season.** I know our nation is going through troubling times. Even though there are a lot of issues we need to work through, just know that my family and I are praying for better days ahead for our nation, and I will continue to work hard to get us there.Have an amazing Thanksgiving.Happy Turkey Day,

Brad Finstad [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-auhnc-jrhhjlljll-r/) [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-auhnc-jrhhjlljll-y/) [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-auhnc-jrhhjlljll-t/)[](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-auhnc-jrhhjlljll-i/) | | [Unsubscribe](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-auhnc-jrhhjlljll-d/)
---

name: Roger Stone
subject: The StoneZONE, by Roger Stone
body:
| [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=0&link=56ddaeacf2fe4daaa3e0db290280f26b)
---
| **ROGER STONE: Trump, Now More Than Ever** Trump is not endorsed or supported by card-carrying members of Washington's Republican establishment. That's a virtue, not a deficiency. **[](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=1&link=dee34fb1a62f4864a77a084cf1dee511)****In an orderly, and incredibly disciplined announcement speech, Donald Trump recast himself as a political outsider prepared to return to the political wars and challenge the entrenched political and media interests who have systematically reversed the incredible record of progress the 45th president posted in his improbable presidency.** Those in the MAGA movement see through the carefully orchestrated, relentless, and entirely false narrative that seeks to blame the former President for the party's underperformance in the midterm elections. How convenient that the relatively easy victory of Trump's endorsed candidate J.D. Vance in Ohio, as well as the tough, but successful re-election of Sen. Ron Johnson (perhaps Trump's biggest defender in the U.S. Senate) in Wisconsin are so easily overlooked by the media. Those in the corporate/government/media cabal now elevate the specter of a candidacy by Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis. The selection of DeSantis as Trump's principal foe is a recognition that the America First constituency is still dominant at the Republican Party's grassroots. DeSantis, despite his establishment pedigree, has governed following the MAGA playbook. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=2&link=7f48d5e3f6524b9694d09342330c187c). **How Money-Laundering + Counterfeit "Currency" Defeats Democracy** An easy to digest and simplified breakdown of the #FTX/#Ukraine/Establishment money scheme that changed the course of the midterms. **[](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=3&link=fe021c11ddae4755a67fa05232cb682c)****For a person who is not by the any stretch of the imagination a currency or crypto expert, this whole situation was a bit fuzzy for me (although I understood the basic "gist").** I know that for most people, having more details in a way that the average joe can understand, is very important. There is a saying in marketing that if a 3rd grader can't understand it, it's too complicated. This ain't marketing, it's just my flawed human attempt to lay bare the facts of the situation in an easy-to-grasp way, God willing. So here we go from the beginning, in a trickle down structure, stay with me... [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=4&link=22705c17886540029d51473ff99eed6f). **Roger Stone Escapes Death In Memphis, Praises God For Miracle #5** Stone walked away when his Ford Expedition was t-boned by a truck that he says failed to stop at a red light near Memphis. [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=5&link=eae1147e252044d49264fcb37581eadc) **Roger Stone gives new meaning to the phrase, 'the show must go on' since he barely escaped death just one day after the 2022 midterm elections while traveling to Mike Lindell's studios in Memphis, Tennessee to record his daily program, The StoneZONE, on the Lindell network.** Stone walked away when his Ford Expedition was t-boned by a truck that he says failed to stop at a red light near Memphis. Stone was reporting on location in the area to broadcast special election coverage with a group of other pundits when he was nearly killed by a driver who rammed through a red light and smashed into the car Stone was traveling in at the time. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=6&link=b24f0e12acdb4ceb80d84c2b30526801). [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=7&link=93fe6d38486d4f34a4e64f624551bef1) **Roger Stone** is a political strategist and pundit and a long-time political advisor and friend of President Donald Trump. Stone was a [victim](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=8&link=4074c40df18d41efa8a55eb6cac315f5) of the Mueller witch-hunt and was charged with lying to Congress in order to pressure him into testifying against the President. Stone refused. After Stone's trial was corrupted by a biased Judge, a corrupt Jury Forewoman and a stacked jury and prosecutors sought to incarcerate Stone in a Covid 19 infested prison in violation of all current legal precedents and DOJ policy, President Donald Trump pardoned Roger Stone on December 23, 2020. On November 3, 2020, at midnight, the US Justice Department by court order released the long-hidden sections of the Mueller Report in which the Special Counsel admitted that his office with its unlimited legal authority and unlimited budget had found "no factual evidence" to tie Roger Stone to Russian Collusion, Wikileaks collaboration or the alleged theft of John Podesta's e-mail. Stone is a New York Times Bestselling author and has returned to political commentary at [StoneZone.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=9&link=9ff6af799d2f46fc9417ef1e957c6fb0). Follow Roger Stone on social media **@TruthSocial**** -******[ https://Truthsocial.com/@RealRogerStone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=10&link=4d82c882af5b4b58a685b0cfea7ebfae) / @ **GAB -** [https://gab.com/RogerJStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=11&link=4747044d35f74e91803061c300d9d378) / **Telegram:** [https://t.me/RogerStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=12&link=d512a6d4076f41758b94e1e59c8ba2f0) / **BitChute:** [https://bitchute.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=13&link=eef59e4e55984281a9a56bfc5eac5b67) / **Rumble:** [https://rumble.com/user/realrogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=14&link=4f8f0832a6e34e95b2148b285c7dfd57) / **Cameo: **[https://cameo.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=15&link=4ae1b8aa73d64a03be2ad70ff8862132) Watch Roger Stone's show, The StoneZONE live every weekday at 5pm EST at [https://StoneZONE.live](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=qleo2eh31o529hw7k9&linkid=16&link=ce47868c261a482ea093df7828dba6b2).
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r) **
---
| | [**Donate Now
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956739:JIXnmYGNh:m:1:3331421248:120572E7F020D070A17247CFEFC4D3AF:r)

No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nad0iZ5mLyFRGlRB8k6fMg&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77297%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o%2buvtOyv1tVJIWN%2fd9qeIg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77298%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UMI0EDEa3MJ5qfQvNVDKWA&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77297%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o%2buvtOyv1tVJIWN%2fd9qeIg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77299%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1FOkqylxCMCWYX9xoK4jZg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77297%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o%2buvtOyv1tVJIWN%2fd9qeIg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77290%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xFspNi%2frWbXH4R2LkBa6YA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77291%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E0TWwpLONAazIt5m8eWvoA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77292%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D93NQZHnXMIa7ybvQfwTLg&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nad0iZ5mLyFRGlRB8k6fMg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nad0iZ5mLyFRGlRB8k6fMg&sysid=1)

EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoalg8m1ee3dk54qvevmdsbumv3ormvqvokbebl0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2o34clh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---

Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3mro0u929u4na4oa36ki0sdicqu22h0ec80rd7g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2o30c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcnkp625tm5ca49uf1r6levvcu6qgjs2fo7l4cb0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2o30c3h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgpb4t2116g76f7me5mk68vdchsv2njdvikf4aqo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2o30c3h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztq0bjtujvqn2fqb8uu9crhgfs30leafspt8g4ko_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2p72cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb2g6n6dgh9ca5uq0dl1l4b3q13gh0lqqea2dm7g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2p72cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd04kvbr8mopgota3iqt1a813pifr3603bvb7jr8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm2p72cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

subject: Exclusive opportunity to get your SIGNED copy of my new memoir

body:
|
---
| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Peter.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957347:6R3HCYGND:m:1:3331703221:03E456E31B32FB715067B4E75467637A:r "Claim your signed
copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

_**Not My First Rodeo**_**by Kristi Noem**

Governor Kristi Noem

body:
Votes are still being counted - we can't give up!

|

**A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM:
SECRETARY OF STATE MIKE POMPEO**
This isn't over yet, Friend.

Some of the closest House races in the country have yet to be called, and Democrats are pouring resources into those districts to flip them blue!

**_House Republicans need our help to overcome this last-second Democrat onslaught and WIN the election._**

**_[Will you accept 1300% matching and chip in now to help House Republicans win these final uncalled races?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9rg1rtun4471oc2dpjvdcut9u0qgsp4o33vil5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjmeor2cdh2bs "Will you accept 1300% matching and chip in now to help House Republicans win these final uncalled races?")_**

THE FINISH LINE:**

**_This election is coming down to the wire and your support can make an immediate difference!_**

But there's no time to waste. These elections could be called very soon. Don't let Democrats run away with the win. **_[Please chip in today!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zta2kj2no2n0uf276b8ve8mfmei268c1rq03bnbo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjmeor2cdh2bs "Please chip in today!")_**

Thank you,

Mike Pompeo

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Christmas Music from Pathway to Victory
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNfY2QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjExMjUyMDIyIn0/1gsba8WjYiJ8nnSPKNd2rA)
---
| Friend, I have exciting news to share and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

Over the years, I have heard from so many viewers and listeners of _Pathway to Victory_ about our wonderful First Baptist Dallas choir and orchestra worship music. And the question we always hear is, “Can I get a copy of that performance to listen to and share with my family?”

Now, this holiday season, I can finally answer, "Yes!"

For the first time, _Pathway to Victory_ has a Christmas music CD available featuring the best performances from the First Baptist Dallas Choir & Orchestra. Let me send you a copy as my thanks for your support of the broadcast ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

This uplifting music CD, called [**_Celebrate The Savior_**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNfY2QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjExMjUyMDIyIn0/A1Gd8BHCI4p9rps1k0HuHg), includes nine songs with arrangements and performances that will please any family member or friend this Christmas season. Songs include:
| | Joy To The World
Star of Wonder
A Christmas Medley of Joy To The World, O Come Let Us Adore Him, Angels We Have Heard On High
Oh Holy Night
Go Tell It On The Mountain
The Glory Of Christmas
I Wonder As I Wander
Christ Is Born

---
| [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNfY2QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjExMjUyMDIyIn0/PWQWL1T3oB-QpgIlz_X3zw)
---
| Don’t wait—**[request your copy today](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jaHJpc3RtYXNfY2QmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QUVfRkFMUjExMjUyMDIyIn0/wM08K9t_lX2DRiTcGr1y4g)** with our thanks for a generous ministry gift to support _Pathway to Victory_ so we can ship it to you in time for Thanksgiving gatherings and for you to play as you decorate for Christmas.

I pray that this music will be a blessing to you and your family this holiday season,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzI5LTUxZmVmMDY3MGZlZTQyOThiZjkwMTNiM2Y1ZTk1Nzc0IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Fwff0DBourZgjimWbfcRJg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Your America
subject: Euclid for YOU!
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6498%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ns3hK53HfGC1XeLJqVHS0w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SR94y83yRei8xgaPvZUflA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ARNKeMt8XhWK66TaOhK86A&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lqzkPEKYHTRgrRAZTLRhUg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6498%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ns3hK53HfGC1XeLJqVHS0w&sysid=1)_

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9q8rknulk9uml0s84i3bng0jnf9jp8nr2lqnsk8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm1pb2cph2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Peter ,this is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)
---
[** DONATE
**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)
---
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957479:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957480:6oL_YYGNk:m:1:3317145305:6AF3E3100CF5597C1B905D51A42C0E29:r)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl01saf2s5ksmgr3sqr5ft5b4797srvo7pb6s8k8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm9ob2c5h2bs)**_

All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win on December 6th!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0f8lfakutdnqmkens9t1vt08l7bhv2ika0pe070_rp22sh2s8i66or4spjm9ob2c5h2bs)**

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Peter, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort - which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in - by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society - the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957035:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957036:63UtbYGN_:m:1:3331421248:466EEC215214ACE260E7998E0AF719B4:r)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956781:6V0juYG5N:m:1:3359512271:49685F310BD0A2C85B27AF802A646FF2:r)
Herschel Walker

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race. But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th. Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election. Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - our Senate race. That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date. We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. name: 1600 Daily
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztf1k6vkc58mam2kvv0erjcv96deaiac8dtqqc78_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34clh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmkh7l669npns8ndr7a50vqq4mu3fgmbr6f8j6og_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34clh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeffqn55190fuvu5emp7clvfl133dvp1tns7d060_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34clh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3fblf44ure348a84gnlnv4bs6hn1f3njjimn7eo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34c5h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgef4r1cuep11scm0uk42e50icfurq5oubll9vhg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34c5h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkqfo6b6s76eg2viuv9d9tq7shk2ko97cq4vg71g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34c5h2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmjsaq8uc300n0ujfvaqfhc1uujqepkaefmm4b0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4spgeco34c5h2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.
