It's time for some honest talk, Peter.

I won my re-election in Florida on Election Day, but Republicans nationally lost one seat in the U.S. Senate. _However, Georgia is headed to overtime with a runoff election._

When you read this, **I want you to be able to hear the alarm in my words.** I am concerned. We must not let our chance to flip this last Senate seat slip through our fingers when we're so close to victory.

**We need Herschel Walker to win if we want to hold on to our 50/50 split in the Senate. Without Herschel in the Senate, Republicans will get steamrolled by Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden's disastrous agenda for America.**

I'm asking you to _dig deep_. **Every other Senate race has now been decided, and whether we win in Georgia is going to come down to whether we can get our voters to the polls once again on December 6th.**

I've pledged to do anything I can for Herschel and his team, which is why I'm reaching out to you right now. **[Is flipping this seat from BLUE to RED worth $25, $50, $100, or even $500 to you?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61958129:6c2TEYGPN:m:1:3317145305:01C388E520DAE1B2B1C928C7B76DEA4D:r)**

**Republicans have one final chance to show Americans that we can win tough races and get America back on track.** Herschel can only win in Georgia if he has the resources to fund his campaign for the next 13 days.

[** HELP HERSCHEL FLIP THIS SEAT ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61958129:6c2TEYGPN:m:1:3317145305:01C388E520DAE1B2B1C928C7B76DEA4D:r)
**[If you invest in just one thing for the rest of this year, there's no better choice than investing directly in Herschel Walker's campaign. He can win his runoff on December 6th- but only with your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61958129:6c2TEYGPN:m:1:3317145305:01C388E520DAE1B2B1C928C7B76DEA4D:r)**

I know political emails can be pesky, but they serve an important purpose. Without your immediate help, I'm afraid we're going to blow a golden opportunity.

From the bottom of my heart, I'm asking you to get involved before it's too late. **[Send Herschel whatever you can right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61958129:6c2TEYGPN:m:1:3317145305:01C388E520DAE1B2B1C928C7B76DEA4D:r)**

Thank you,

Marco Rubio
United States Senator

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61958129:6c2TEYGPN:m:1:3317145305:01C388E520DAE1B2B1C928C7B76DEA4D:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democracy Friday: Georgia is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. President Biden won this swing state in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. … It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls. Can you help at this vital time?
body:
Voting starts tomorrow
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4b9cf00-2fce-4913-81a7-bb79b1a60bd6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T381a518f-b473-4bdc-92ff-38d23c4d9b6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this time due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te3a0bfa7-b9ab-4b17-9f45-9e095ad06b94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | **_Tomorrow--this Saturday--early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker?_** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1f35ebe-81cc-403b-941f-e542354ca8f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**

Cliff

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. body:

# #1 Item to Hoard In 2022
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqqnanm6k5vdclq4b63kiu4ctekq479fi1blps60_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2dehbvr11l8j1f2rpvqbmo4bj0q9c1582c55iv8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01jta9rp5nvuoth4d1dt7j6iqme5gqu1b569peo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcls45ho2inovmuic9f92r8tt2n0k4uh2044erpo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zke9dvijljee97plg7i4bckkhfugucgodiim0tn0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjahis7e913ronrfqgslb42f0tkbvnlehf3rppso_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhgjm8q3aatp7h27oe3v711qsl0ici0s0a7sm0h8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0i8qeki8f3fnt4a91h5m3so1jba6ul1iguogb00_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd19q2l04g5nl420508ac2f7n178s7ia5khmgb20_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o75c1h2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? clean_body: Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo #1 Item to Hoard In 2022 Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: The Biden administration hates this
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty,I'm writing to you today because your right to protect yourself through self-manufacturing firearms is under assault. And I want to tell you about a couple of courageous clients who are fighting for these natural rights in court. Mike Andren is a retired aerospace engineer and firearms instructor. Jennifer VanDerStok is a writer for a small local magazine who also happens to be a former law enforcement officer. Both Mike and Jennifer have embraced the American spirit of independence and the practice of crafting their own tools of self-defense-a proud tradition that predates the founding of our Nation. But the Biden administration hates this. And it is now attempting to use the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) to sidestep Congress and rewrite the law to severely burden this time-honored tradition.On top of this, gun control advocates have become focused on suppressing this right-especially through use of the misleading term "ghost guns." Their intent is to tarnish the good reputation of peaceable citizens like Mike, who have dedicated themselves to helping others be self-sufficient and confident in their abilities to defend themselves, or Jennifer, who protected our community for eight years in law enforcement. Mountain States Legal Foundation filed a lawsuit in August on behalf of Mike and Jennifer to defend their rights-and yours-in court. **[And I'm asking you to support their fight by signing our petition today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** This case really has two components that are concerning.First, even if you don't self-manufacture your own firearms, your natural rights could be greatly impacted. And that could hinder your ability to protect yourself and your loved ones.Second, if the federal government is allowed to bypass Congress and the United States Constitution in this case, there's no telling what they'll get away with next.But your voice today will tell the government that enough is enough. This blatant government overreach must be stopped. Please sign the petition right now to stand with Mike and Jennifer-and for your right to bear arms using this secure link: **[https://mslegal.org/subscribe/vanderstok-petition/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** By doing so, you'll show unelected bureaucracies that they need to stop threatening the rights of individual citizens. For Liberty!Cristen WohlgemuthPresident & CEOMountain States Legal Foundation
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzI5LTE2M2I4MjgyZTBlNTQ5Mzk5Yzc5NTAxZmJjNmJkODNiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/1EZLrslPO9tjJK5KxUUnog) to unsubscribe.
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Reserve your place in the study group
body:
You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis’s answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free 3-week study
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zor19j88neni1prc57tsgr666pl9qtr7r3kjopco_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3hm3g76ojks1q78t75moob6cdgcepndcb0cqq72c37m8qj1cpgmqqm2cj162oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32d5l6orrepj664rjbd77m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6p76c3hm6ob4s8iv0)
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrb7au58hmvo6beq7b990htl2ku7p1tf4p0o3nk0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge6or1cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

You are invited to discover C.S. Lewis's answers to the great questions of the Christian faith by joining a free **3-week study group** on one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" C.S. Lewis on Christianity."**

C.S. Lewis is the best modern writer at explaining the truth and goodness of the Christian faith. Through his imaginative and invigorating style, Lewis answers the eternal questions of theology in a manner that attracts those outside Christianity and strengthens those within the faith. This course examines Lewis's writings about morality, conversion, prayer, the Bible, suffering, and the afterlife.

Here's a sample of what our online students are saying about the course.

_" Shares the story of C.S. Lewis in a way that is easy to understand. Very entertaining and thought-provoking." - Tammy from Georgia_

_" The course is organized very well. The instructor is a very gifted speaker who explains concepts clearly and passionately." - Bob from Colorado_

_" It gives the student insight into who C.S. Lewis really was as a man. He feels accessible all of a sudden. My wife gave me a compendium of eight volumes of his works, and I look forward to reading them now." - Mark from Washington_

**Join this exclusive study group on "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" for FREE-starting November 29.**

Reserve your spot here: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-study-group](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj0895jcngr0du0rp43q1v9fbjs51idcbch5epno_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge6or1cjh2bs)

I hope you join us in this exploration of Lewis's timeless lessons on the truth and beauty of the Christian faith.

Warm Regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I’m counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55070180/380584412/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZmNzE2Mi1kNTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_vqxn8_YqknsQY1KjL-9wQKCpLKm3Gv_D5lTLId-G8=)
Friends: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for re-election to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:** [**Please, will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between me and Michael Bennet so we can keep Georgia blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55070181/380584413/-2083840423?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20221125_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZmNzE2Mi1kNTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_vqxn8_YqknsQY1KjL-9wQKCpLKm3Gv_D5lTLId-G8=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55070182/380584414/-2083840423?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20221125_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDZmNzE2Mi1kNTZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L_vqxn8_YqknsQY1KjL-9wQKCpLKm3Gv_D5lTLId-G8=) I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda — from voting rights to reproductive freedoms — is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all-in to defeat me and crush our progress. **They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. clean_body: | = Friends: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a Founding Donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical — and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for re-election to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = = I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda — from voting rights to reproductive freedoms — is on the line in this race. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment are all-in to defeat me and crush our progress. They've already spent more than $50 million to prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and you can bet there's a lot more where that came from. But unlike Walker, I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I need grassroots folks like you with me to win — now more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Raphael Warnock and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you, Reverend Warnock Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Friend,

Our team is fighting hard to ensure every LEGAL vote is counted - but we cannot do it alone.

This is where you come in, Friend, this is the final push, and I can’t do this without you.

[**Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84669%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sO4zOj02SzwUi9Be2605ow&sysid=1)

**I’m asking for your immediate help.**

[**With one contribution of $5, $10, or $35, I can reach every corner of the state and make sure that Republicans know that their ballot may NOT have been counted.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84660%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4d1dZd8lhcuHY5vDb33CkA&sysid=1)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYJPjHu3kxlr_AQBF-009Xpws1889uA30vpCdz5VJ26tFIkhrJPocqooclHPO9gZS2FJddscAo5fFj5pbRKgmn9qJGbNUHBq9tUXhfa0B7aVOxZK393G0GnVbK9lPqQMrKSElavMs1rCU5PwgIlwz8Mg%3D)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYPf0nX5Ky_JtoN_d7599sSjjEMjdFK-__Kz5eiG8Mg0sOP6wnR7GJ_eN-MxmaHglomgBW12zRQ-HJiGf-DoQILdh3Hm9t_Nl8xurws1x9fO5D9ZNQsbhjgjxeoWPEAqxsI2FJGMs_am6RYgeEHHulpY%3D)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYKb4-QgV_HZhyB0dwLEw9dRwHERuahwyz7k_8JeAmtyBObtSuBoWPsrq-l_Kga94ZNXZJBulS3HGsuBC4ert22cHj4bpiOK1n52F6rt0hDBKiOK5gweUrcPI9Qrf2Zf0-ywkOe5XLbkZugDJSrsmyDo%3D)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYP2Ehok0gYjYYpH7hk_uihE4Kxw7wdlDDY7LaQTNNN3gLBPyep93VvCgg86UkKjNb31Zj9vpYCQwfwwsQaYJLcTt5JnQBpzL5IS-Z6CRrXCZyMakiV7RLtnjOU-MKFzWgYJKgdx2591ZFEur7vLAHNY%3D)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYNb2nEYK_kSnfFMSHmaXivDbuTwY6-DJuVYhn_eF6l__qvQqaXMcsu5FLgRYmKj5AMM1tZgsX4-5DTptWgIfDq63TokUORqXt2FUnCxfLsPlcamRP26eBcPbXnQGEYZ6pOZNhD4y33NkBx1YbVmLQrI%3D)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYIx5RqmXQEpy70kvXYa2e25v42kDAjgzRlkmHkxNsTBBuAvvMByhT5qJd_-aqm4-Jg6eE3NERLdd5RFc7UlU_2qaeEQ3YwQhe5WU3eWrvv3Rwx1ZSwscRKhC9qPgaDBJcL7lR5bWOkACJPxJDFcpzXg%3D)** [**DONATE**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYBNXTLIsPdYvjKRKdEJR-zZzrgEvJmfVRolVhzqtsdEj2aj3GYrQ6BNHWwDCus1T4wdXwzYwBx7hWVXujC8PgDX4wF2hC5aqsFAHQ-dzdrO_RkY4RE4MuQwYiwkH3JSuLvvKNmyXmwA75uFrgcsqZyg%3D) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c55bc8d95e7740e2b1560c285a7e3efe&_e=G8ovdDt2FBCXXnzlVkhZAy1YnGJh1BhiIDR-Ij4w29ej0bIXbtsO7F6iBzHZrJXdggZGcQXOgIJC_IuwScv4IuOz8O1zCwhI-L8Cf6Y8gGkKshr-sX9HaGYX3Uta9qDHuBcRQpdSfEINRWH3wU4nCkVr2Z9sDtQKr6NuaBWhIiS8oJzK7MsBYRn3LXhL-OG91a9Q3xsvWrtpzSru8L6RYM5prb_3unGhogHO2bfxTsyRKbcWDfv8UsKQhDT2UQrEL8smD83Pn4MQxis2qdNv1v11oTEQ3rRucCEgLcGVDsac_YDNFcbxixjTjq28BSPHK17fu4c3fElZQ7UD7YmhfAgTAt6jImHHuAiUUv6OmdM%3D) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957501:6lQ7VYGBN:m:1:3253819041:0F7976FE9C742642757AA610601B29DA:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 12 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957501:6lQ7VYGBN:m:1:3253819041:0F7976FE9C742642757AA610601B29DA:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957501:6lQ7VYGBN:m:1:3253819041:0F7976FE9C742642757AA610601B29DA:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957501:6lQ7VYGBN:m:1:3253819041:0F7976FE9C742642757AA610601B29DA:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957501:6lQ7VYGBN:m:1:3253819041:0F7976FE9C742642757AA610601B29DA:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | Friend: In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor of our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.** My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, this makes me SICK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960459:6gQWGYG9N:m:1:3331421248:14CD8AB97B28B201F6D307FAFC223EC1:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. subject: Build a Conservative Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd27avsuplvl8u35guv0fuuhhmu0fstd4ci18030_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tlic2on3dlgchpr5d73ckoecojimlqr6dtm64rrcsr761p36dlgmlie4cj26jjrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup72pjgesqj4ptncdj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm6p76c3gm1pj6c8iv0)

|

|
---
Fellow Conservative: Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. _**And so do we!**_
**[Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4ca118n8eps8ei39me982p57k3bedln1ta0n5ro_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o76cph2bs)**
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn’t have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: _**conservative principles and us.**_
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he’s got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth... ▶︎ To fight inflation?
▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?
▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?
▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?
▶︎ To secure our border?
▶︎ To clean up our streets?
**[Please send $5, $10, $25, or more to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zarc9oichtvoub7im12taif0j0sc5gnla7nlorvg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o76cph2bs)**
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates. Sincerely,
---
---
Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**GEORGIA RUNOFF** **COUNTDOWN**
---
---

300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

subject: Kyrsten is setting the standard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, We wanted to take a moment to celebrate: It’s been a little over a year since the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs_ bill was signed into law. Kyrsten led this bipartisan effort to deliver much-needed updates to the infrastructure we all rely on every day. Since then, $2.6 billion has been invested into key improvements in Arizona roads, bridges, and water systems — helping to make the lives of Arizonans safer and easier by improving air and water quality, developing clean energy technology, and so much more. **Kyrsten is setting the standard by showing what can be accomplished when we set our differences aside and focus on delivering results on the issues that matter to everyday families.** We look forward to seeing the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs_ law continue to build better lives for families in Arizona and across the country. Now, in order to have the resources to back Kyrsten’s work in the Senate, we must come together in a united effort. [**So friend, will you show your support for everything Kyrsten is accomplishing by chipping in $10 before our end-of-month deadline? clean_body: | Team, We wanted to take a moment to celebrate: It’s been a little over a year since the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs bill was signed into law. Kyrsten led this bipartisan effort to deliver much-needed updates to the infrastructure we all rely on every day. Since then, $2.6 billion has been invested into key improvements in Arizona roads, bridges, and water systems — helping to make the lives of Arizonans safer and easier by improving air and water quality, developing clean energy technology, and so much more. Kyrsten is setting the standard by showing what can be accomplished when we set our differences aside and focus on delivering results on the issues that matter to everyday families. We look forward to seeing the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs law continue to build better lives for families in Arizona and across the country. Now, in order to have the resources to back Kyrsten’s work in the Senate, we must come together in a united effort. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for being a part of our team. — Team Sinema Sinema for Arizona P.O. **BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Peter, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. _**[Will you help us close the financial gap immediately?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61959875:Jy54GYGNz:m:1:3372944669:AAB50F659E21659FD41D08906D08326E:r)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate.

Please, Peter, let me know you're still with us. **[Please chip in $3 or more before midnight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61959875:Jy54GYGNz:m:1:3372944669:AAB50F659E21659FD41D08906D08326E:r)**

Our team is fighting hard to ensure every LEGAL vote is counted - but we cannot do it alone.

This is where you come in, Peter, this is the final push, and I can't do this without you.

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, this makes me SICK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960365:JixLIYGNp:m:1:3345639852:74F86A48503A4848ABF7F2FFA87FE0E9:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Black Friday’s biggest deal: 6 more years of good service in the Senate
body:
Georgia voting starts tomorrow
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa10f483-835c-4169-974e-b77fb3676739/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | With Black Friday here, we know there are a lot of great deals out there. **[But the best deal for our country today is investing just a bit more in returning a man of honor, compassion and moral strength, Senator Raphael Warnock, to the U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf884448-bb57-4996-a87e-3953ef7a60c0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **(...or you could see it as keeping the violent misogynist, democracy-hater, Donald Trump suck-up, and a man who'd rather a woman die than have the right to an abortion, Herschel Walker, away from having any power over our lives. We’re flexible, we can look at it both ways!)** On December 6th, with your help today, we can **close this deal and give Democrats a 51st Senate seat so we can get so much more done.** We're not telling you not to take advantage of Black Friday! (We certainly will.) Just to remind you to _take advantage of election day Tuesday, December 6th--a deal that will last six years_ _!_
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Black Friday special: 6 more years of good service in the US Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73f947a9-15bc-4813-b1e7-d799a3bd6229/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **[Can you join the Blue Amp Action community in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to help deal Senator Warnock into the Senate, and deal a blow to the vapid, violent Herschel Walker's chances of ever going to Washington as anything more than a tourist?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62b9378d-a03b-469f-b4a1-edc4171c8a8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Hope you had a Happy Thanksgiving, and thank you for being part of our community!
---
Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! **IF** Trump's Republicans are successful in their attempts to end this investigation, we may never uncover the whole truth of what happened on January 6th...

MAGA Republicans are kicking their smear campaign into OVERDRIVE.

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, this is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960529:6dN8wYGNC:m:1:3331703221:859900E35EE13CCE5CBBF8D2EE5C6B06:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join the fight to protect the unborn
body:
I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. An
|
---
| | Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I’m writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn.** And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court’s decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense.

**We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

Today I’d like to ask you to join thousands of others who believe the sanctity of life is worth defending by adding your name to the pledge I have linked below:

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/sign-pro-life-statement/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf2hqckhtr5a9f6g3a666eb2dmma85vcocflgnh8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o77cdh2bs)**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left’s anti-life ideology. [**Will you take one minute to stand with me by signing this pledge now?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8mvbn0nog3sk8ke7sand4sfh3qmvd06mg10t950_rp22sh2s8i66or4spge2o77cdh2bs)

I’d like to thank you for joining this critical effort. Together, we can save thousands of lives from abortion over the next year. Gratefully,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

Peter Willis, in
September Our Revolution and our coalition fought hard to defeat the Dirty
Deal, which would fast-track fossil fuel projects and gut frontline
community protections.

Well, it’s rearing its ugly head again, and we'll be joined by Senator
Jeff Merkley (D-OR) for a LIVE organizing call on Monday to stop the deal
once and for all.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=3791%2E5885482%2EN0njem ]RSVP HERE

The Dirty Deal would sacrifice lives, lock communities into more
pollution, silence local voices, and sabotage our climate goals. We must
work in solidarity to amplify strong congressional and frontline
opposition.

In Round 1, Our Revolution members made thousands of calls to their
Members of Congress to leverage the power of the people. Can we count on
you to be ready for Round 2?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=3791%2E5885482%2EN0njem ]SIGN UP HERE

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

name: Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
subject: For Black Friday, give the gift of safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter, Now that Thanksgiving has passed, frantic holiday shopping begins. Black Friday, especially, is a time to be sure you're getting all the best sales and deals for your family this holiday season. At Pride Fund, our focus today won't be on gifting our friends with the coolest designer shoes or newest gadgets, because we have the opportunity to help those around us have the gift of safety and security from gun violence. **[_We can win the fight to secure gun reform and defend our democracy from the MAGA right wing NRA backed politicians that threaten the safety of us all. But we need support from grassroots donors like you. A gift to Pride Fund is a gift for gun safety. Will you donate today while you do your Black Friday shopping?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/NCOzPqYjzlRJfbPb57J3p24GZyLDUJF5KUNM5zxABrg=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)** **_[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/NCOzPqYjzlRJfbPb57J3p24GZyLDUJF5KUNM5zxABrg=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)_** At Pride Fund, we are working around the clock right now in response to the mass shooting at a gay bar in Colorado Springs, Colorado that left 5 dead and 25 injured. The gunman had an assault rifle and other guns with him to carry out the attack. The investigation has revealed there were warning signs ahead of time that he was at risk for committing violence against himself or others. Sadly Colorado doesn't have "Red Flag" laws where those close to him could have filed a safety concern and his weapons could have been removed for a period of time while his mental health was reviewed. We need these laws in every state, but sadly many do not. Pride Fund was created in response to the Pulse nightclub shooting in 2016 where the gay nightclub was targeted by a mass shooter and 49 people died, 53 others were injured and countless others were permanently scarred by the experience. We have worked tirelessly since our creation in the days after Pulse and we are working extra hard right now after a second LGBTQ establishment was the target by a mass shooter. The LGBTQ community is fired up and our resolve has been strengthened even more. But we need your financial help to fuel the fight. [The holidays can be the slowest time of year for fundraising. Please help us raise the essential funds to keep our momentum going. Give the gift of safety by donating today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/NCOzPqYjzlRJfbPb57J3p24GZyLDUJF5KUNM5zxABrg=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes) In solidarity, Pride Fund |
---|---
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/NCOzPqYjzlRJfbPb57J3p24GZyLDUJF5KUNM5zxABrg=?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes)
---
**To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?**

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? **[Sign up here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/BHh_kBdgyIiUQkiUHB2DzpzjBu6JGjNC70BW2LDJSWY=)**
| | Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Copyright © 2016 Pride Fund to End Gun Violence, All rights reserved.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y5EiqotgCocgAn_lQdeGLX_Qqx5JT7F6Enbmcq-Xe20=/EmatL6ooqvcL-TfEeOg8D_r3VhSNuIcJSftyaV8T-Co=). Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
PO Box 32377
Washington DC 20007 United States

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Transgender Showers US Marine Corps ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960404:6QEewYGN9:m:1:3253819041:CE5613F1EAEF92DE88416F6B43FDCDB2:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: December 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956831:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956832:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956833:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956834:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956835:JRqQvYGNN:m:1:3370555685:CC41BE102600EBC5F254281C247EF0C0:r)

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Transgender Showers US Marine Corps 🤯
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960371:JN1rvYGUN:m:1:3346849603:7CDBC010C824899A087EFB3E6556FBC1:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

| | | Howdy Peter, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Peter.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvikg1r96b88u20el7vd27g7e0mmrqgm7smj1vbg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o35c1h2bs)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn7k05kmh0qm1iq8r8sot254rleoake5irn7t560_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o35c1h2bs)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtj32sb7fns8skrartjc75iq4enlp0d4qgspgsg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o35c1h2bs)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zanee86n0udped8qq0sadtkf7v5hse58fdk65ai8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o35c1h2bs)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z15buo86782ihbua0ai9s73ka6ifnvtmmvvhqo68_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o35c1h2bs)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to raise $30,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961177:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961178:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961179:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961180:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961181:6o7o-YGNd:m:1:3331703221:E457BF9216AA4480034980336D25A8CB:r)
