name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdn57dp419ra2u1goekur6th28b7agfli1rel6g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o31cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z10t8lk7dm1rmg9msdo97d9sn9vs39q8bs3q2k3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o31cjh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z54gnjtf0sq8745jta3v4uoa60ckctcvv929dma8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o31cjh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h55d9sku042enks82gh8egben2nu6u6bisqls8_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o31cjh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8r2fmq2oshn41i43b94mk626a41pg70v2r7ve2g_rp22sh2s8i66or4spie4o31cjh2bs)

subject: Horrific reality the troops in our military are facing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960426:J7VV-YG5N:m:1:3317145305:01A28AD20DB9AAC91A2236AF06FF2F2A:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

body:

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84611%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6nH2GEgeKTVQAocVjBhOrA&sysid=1)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84612%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i%2fnwizNrpxbZ8vApbwur6w&sysid=1)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84613%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4IrSXXWi4Vcr4i%2b9yh7kg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84614%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZthjtITkE45P9FQFUnbjLQ&sysid=1)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84625%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EPHkf8nJHnggZTW0n7pwRA&sysid=1)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need to raise $30,000 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2z6jois9k6ri27f2pmrl92pddof6i5oj0oadh90g8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf83nmpon79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6lqr79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjmgq66sjhmti73cjlcmoe4ppjc3hb6p3mcdqr2oljchh36d5m6ir32tjjehr6fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4saqmcdb4mkpm0tj7coon1cj26pp238h1e8he49j5c5ie6p37cth2bs)
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.
[](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zqaseu7urmnl65tr1uou0kdvg53kf315i0gd4s8o_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no) [** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2z9dq8c98najunrraqpbhve7vhcochc78s3v1a2q8_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2z8c08b6bdgtuira0g7o4kcj3n2qs454lma4n7b6g_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2z1ntr8duaqs5tno4up9ue8jmlkvk1ivj265bm8l8_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2z6ii0defvtld491b9tg5t8dqh8htdvaqasmnocu0_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zps2mfmg827vvdu14gqlqpqpd8bftm5pqcqv79r0_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)**

Thanks,

[](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2znbrfmemsb4uuo8gh51bs7hr01et1gl1uui5qo08_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zk742bjc37fc9n7oi8604hbt3042a1j6esuqep10_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)

[](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zgitatp2gs15nkdng0rlhn4jn9t27vj1em433ps0_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no) [](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2ztul128mpqk3bgoq1lq16tvmu3f0phcv9f8msv40_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no) [](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zmisv8grutioal228oeqtp4iq3krde7a747c913o_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no) [](http://post.conservativeum.com/rd/9z2zdavforbo4cq6sg6o8f9csq8icpd5f81f3hhg0mo_rp22sh2s8j6aob4sdi6epr24no)

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960377:6bqwKYGN8:m:1:3350876382:B89B1B51B0D05FDDAA4ADACF4CED74E0:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His life and future are in your hands
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvghmn8kgeuboiidod6nl2nlve6f8vrdr41dduvg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spieaor2c5h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0kn8bgstmm6gcptkgac5i4ik6c55ljhvpbl11vo_rp22sh2s8i66or4spieaor2c5h2bs) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvh682h143medo19kgo1324tnk31sk8f4rgggjt0_rp22sh2s8i66or4spieaor2c5h2bs) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl66ha6leh9v0tkjcmijbbevtsjv2sffk5su0asg_rp22sh2s8i66or4spieaor2c5h2bs)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,

name: Team Hawley
subject: What do YOU think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, As we approach the 118th Congress, conservatives have a LOT of issues to tackle.

clean_body: Votes are still being counted – we can’t give up! | | | | A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM: SECRETARY OF STATE MIKE POMPEO This isn’t over yet, Friend. Some of the closest House races in the country have yet to be called, and Democrats are pouring resources into those districts to flip them blue! House Republicans need our help to overcome this last-second Democrat onslaught and WIN the election. name: Giffords
subject: Support Giffords PAC today with a purchase from our store
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When you make a purchase from the Giffords store, you can feel confident that 100% of your purchase is a donation to Giffords PAC and our efforts to save lives.
#

Friends -
We hope that as some of you may start your holiday shopping this Black Friday, you’ll consider purchasing merchandise from the Giffords store.
We have merchandise perfect for anyone in your life who is committed to the fight to end gun violence and wants to wear their values.
[**We have our classic T-shirts, buttons, totes, and more:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24252?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=1&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24342?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=2&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24475?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=3&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[**We have our Courage Collab with original art from Tyson Krank and Rebecca Williams:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24497?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=4&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24606?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=5&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24608?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=6&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[**And for the responsible gun owners in your life, we have T-shirts, hats, stickers, and magnets in our Gun Owners for Safety collection:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24633?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=7&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24721?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=8&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/24721?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=9&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
When you make a purchase from the Giffords store, you can feel confident that your purchase is a donation to Giffords PAC, and 100% of the proceeds go directly toward our efforts to save lives.
[**So please, click here to visit our online store today and give the gift of Giffords merch this holiday season.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/24723?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=10&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)
**[VISIT THE STORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/24723?utm_source=em221125-1-30&utm_campaign=em221125-1-30&t=11&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z)**
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2786%2E3935704%2EeDEU4z) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

for 2022 midterms")

You're reading that right, Peter. **Three Democrats in Senate races were able to raise over $220 MILLION. These are record breaking numbers and we're starting to get worried because the Left are only going to get more and more resources as time goes on.**

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are constantly calling their billionaire coastal elite friends to bankroll Democrat campaigns and we'll be honest... their plan has worked. **Just look at how they were able to stop our red wave.**

And that's exactly why it's so important we don't make the same mistake twice. **We need to start preparing NOW and build the strongest foundation Republicans have ever seen** because there is too much at stake to lose.

**[If you're committed to lower taxes, limited government, and a strong national defense, then we need you to chip in whatever you can afford to help us DEFEAT the Left and SAVE America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961149:JRn5dYGNL:m:1:3253819041:61F37DE51F4D91DA0C7B8FC042DE9331:r "If you’re

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961150:JRn5dYGNL:m:1:3253819041:61F37DE51F4D91DA0C7B8FC042DE9331:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**

DREAM")

Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961151:JRn5dYGNL:m:1:3253819041:61F37DE51F4D91DA0C7B8FC042DE9331:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Horrific reality: Transgender Showers US Marine Corps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960383:JEINHYGN1:m:1:3359512271:A47F47818D82AF26F52CB8E70C9558E7:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. ****** ************ **** **** ******************** **** **** **** **** **** **** | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson PO BOX 53058 AMARILLO, TX 79159 If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956846:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956847:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956848:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956849:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956850:6vXjHYGUN:m:1:3371220873:6A16A12914B9A7E75F4D7655F4A2B6CB:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tomorrow, Saturday, November 26th, early voting starts. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat.
body:
voting starts tomorrow
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a70ec0b-6dd9-4b8f-b596-95a2fb671da1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_We're only one day away from early voting beginning in Georgia so we can return Senator Warnock to Washingtont! It costs about a dollar to get a voter to the polls in Georgia! Can you help today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde59d8b5-4407-424b-9d4a-c229ddad39c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tomorrow, Saturday, November 26th, early voting starts. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. _** **_Healthcare, abortion rights, further action on regulating guns, paid family & medical leave, a $15 min wage & preventing a potential climate catastrophe are just some of the many issues on the ballot in Georgia. _**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Georgia Senate runoff voting starts tomorrow!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3012cb2b-4c17-4644-bbad-679d7aa02165/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We must get his back--first, make a plan to vote tomorrow if you live in Georgia!-- by rushing him the resources to turn out voters once the early voting period begins. As we told you previously, it costs .98 to vote in Georgia. Our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters!_** [**_Can you join us in rushing Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so he can bank early votes and put this race out of reach for Republicans--like Herschel Walker--who'll try to cheat and overturn a loss?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27ed80c4-c955-43de-b18b-a74eec238fac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much BlueAmp Community! We're so close to the finish line.**
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Peter,

Rev. Warnock is in an extremely tight race here in Georgia (the latest poll has him TIED with his Trump-backed opponent), but with the help of our top grassroots supporters like YOU, we’ll re-elect Rev. Warnock and defeat Herschel Walker once and for all.

Your donation will help fully fund our voter outreach program so that we can meet voters where they’re at to make sure they know when, where, and how to vote in the Senate runoff race.

**_[This weekend is our last chance to do everything we can to re-elect Rev. Warnock before early voting starts everywhere in Georgia on Monday. Will you rush a donation so we can reach as many voters as possible before it’s too late?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55069726/380582930/710125701?refcode=20221125.1_KGB_11DO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzVjMWYwMS1kNDZjLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNwXPzly8e8fzvo2ajj5BXG5ojvyA_1nt7lt0j-uJu0=)_**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Our Revolution
subject: a global action taking the fight to Amazon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

On this Black Friday, Our Revolution is
proud to join a worldwide coalition with more than 80 unions and
organizations for strikes and protests against Amazon in 32 countries. We
are thrilled to participate in this global day of action to Make Amazon
Pay!

Amazon — a multinational corporation that enriches itself with government
contracts and treats its warehouse employees and drivers as subhuman — is
an ongoing threat to every working family in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8051?t=1011&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]That's why we're proud to take action in solidarity with workers around
the world to demand justice. Help us scale up our campaign against Amazon
and other abusive corporations by pitching in here!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8044?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1012&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8045?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1013&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8046?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1014&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8047?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1015&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8048?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1016&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8049?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221125_1_1&t=1017&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

As Amazon deals with a surging labor movement organizing in their
facilities, they have chosen to use their limitless resources to ensure
they can continue exploiting working people with no consequences.

That's why Our Revolution and every other organization that supports
working people must join this fight. Workers need to stand in solidarity,
especially on days like Black Friday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8043?t=1018&akid=3793%2E5885482%2E_cI_e8 ]Help us challenge corporate power and support a surging labor movement
at Amazon by donating here. Every gift is a huge help!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Senator Marco Rubio
subject: My thoughts on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm really grateful you chose to open this email. Now, I have another request - **can you please read it all the way through?** I promise I'll keep it short.

Herschel Walker is competing against Democrat Raphael Warnock in a runoff election. For the short two years he's already been in the Senate, Warnock has been a rubber stamp for the radical Left's agenda. _Can you imagine the damage he would cause if elected to a full six-year term?_

Herschel's runoff is 11 days away, and he let me know he's worried he may not have the resources to keep up with his opponent - on TV, on volunteer recruitment, online, or even at the ballot box.

I'm reaching out because I'm hoping you will see how important Herschel's race is. **[I'm not asking for much, just $25 can make a difference in this tight race:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961197:JMeYhYGoN:m:1:3331703221:6A16E82018184277AA118C567286C41D:r "I’m not asking for much, just $10 can make a difference in this tight race:")**
---
| | | [SEND $25 TO HERSCHEL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961197:JMeYhYGoN:m:1:3331703221:6A16E82018184277AA118C567286C41D:r "SEND $10 TO HERSCHEL")
---
We simply can't afford to fall short of his goal today. Herschel and I would both be thrilled to see you step up.

Thank you,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961197:JMeYhYGoN:m:1:3331703221:6A16E82018184277AA118C567286C41D:r "SMR Headshot")
---

Marco Rubio
---
| | | [SEND $25 TO HERSCHEL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961197:JMeYhYGoN:m:1:3331703221:6A16E82018184277AA118C567286C41D:r "SEND $10 TO HERSCHEL")
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961198:JMeYhYGoN:m:1:3331703221:6A16E82018184277AA118C567286C41D:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")

body:
We did not see the ‘Red Wave’ materialize Election Night, but we can still win the final battle of 2022 and make things better for America. |

---
Fellow American - _I'm not going to mince words._

We all wish that Republicans had won a majority in the Senate two weeks ago. We wish the 'Red Wave' had shown up and given us a big majority in the House of Representatives.

And while I'm pleased that we kept Senator Raphael Warnock below 50% on Election Day after he spent over $100 million, we all wish we could've beaten him outright.

**But here's the reality: we're in a runoff in Georgia for the final Senate seat in America.**

Fellow American, we have one last chance to get America back on the right track. You can help Republicans keep the Senate at 50-50 AND flip Georgia's Senate seat from BLUE to RED.

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Horiffic: Transgender Showers US Marine Corps 😮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960422:JydkDYGYN:m:1:3372944669:D4A3EFBBF611D2BD33FB0F896CCCDEED:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

subject: our people-powered movement shocked the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend – I'm feeling hopeful. Last year, our people-powered movement shocked the nation by flipping Georgia blue and taking the Senate back for Democrats.

**All eyes are once again on Georgia – and right now, we have a problem: With just 11 days until the runoff election ends, we're on track to fall short of our critical $100,000 midnight fundraising goal!**
Donald Trump's allies have already rushed this race with more than $37 million to help my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, defeat me. So if we don't get back on track ASAP, we could be putting my seat at serious risk.

body:
#
Derek -
We know your inbox is clogged with Black Friday deals and holiday emails. So today, we are not going to ask you to buy anything or throw flashy discounts your way, but we do have one simple request.
[**Can you please chip in $5, $10, $25 or anything you can afford today to VoteVets in the spirit of Thanksgiving? We are so grateful to have you on our team, and every contribution you make will go directly toward defeating Herschel Walker in the Georgia runoff race.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vvh-em-walker-ad-nov22.lGlqDh&refcode=em221125-1-15&t=1&akid=7188%2E3013755%2E3Vf5jU)

This ad _will_ bolster the support for Rev. Warnock if we have the funding and resources to show it across all of Georgia.
[**So please, make your contribution to VoteVets today. Every dollar will help send Rev. Warnock across the finish line and send Herschel Walker packing once and for all.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/3042?c0=vvh-em-walker-ad-nov22.lGlqDh&refcode=em221125-1-15&t=3&akid=7188%2E3013755%2E3Vf5jU)

The team at VoteVets

**2022 was the busiest — _and most successful_ — year our team at the Fairness Project has had yet. **Just a few short weeks ago, we helped voters:
* Protect their homes and cars from medical debt traps in Arizona;
* Prove _no one_ is above the law — not even the Sheriff in L.A. County;
* Raise the minimum wage in deeply conservative Nebraska to $15/hr;
* Expand access to affordable health care to over 40,000 South Dakotans;
* And make history in Michigan and Vermont by running some of the first-ever ballot measures to protect abortion access **permanently.**

**I’ll be the first to say — these victories were no easy feat.** Every ballot measure campaign we win is the result of years of research, education, and mobilizing voters. clean_body: As one of our most loyal supporters, you know that Giving Tuesday is our most critical fundraising day of the entire year — and this year is even more significant because a generous donor has offered to match all donations that come in! | | Friend, Giving Tuesday is just around the corner — and I’m excited to announce that this year, we’ve set our biggest fundraising goal ever. This Giving Tuesday, we’re aiming to raise $10,000 to help us power more progress in 2023, 2024, and beyond — directly at the ballot box. As one of our most loyal supporters, friend, you know that Giving Tuesday is our most critical fundraising day of the entire year. And this year is even more significant, = But, there’s a catch → in order to unlock this very special double match, we need to kickstart our Giving Tuesday fundraising and raise $2,500 before tomorrow at midnight = = 2022 was the busiest — and most successful — year our team at the Fairness Project has had yet. Just a few short weeks ago, we helped voters: Protect their homes and cars from medical debt traps in Arizona; Prove no one is above the law — not even the Sheriff in L.A. County; Raise the minimum wage in deeply conservative Nebraska to $15/hr; Expand access to affordable health care to over 40,000 South Dakotans; And make history in Michigan and Vermont by running some of the first-ever ballot measures to protect abortion access permanently. I’ll be the first to say — these victories were no easy feat. Every ballot measure campaign we win is the result of years of research, education, and mobilizing voters. When we agree to take on a ballot measure campaign, we go all in — putting every resource we can towards winning that campaign. That means while the next election might be 2 years away, we’re already working NOW to identify what campaigns we’ll run in the cycle ahead. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’m grateful for your support, = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible. = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:
| | | Peter, Inflation is hitting hardworking Americans where it hurts.

With prices up, Americans across our country are struggling - and Joe Biden _refuses_ to do anything about it.

We’re taking inventory to see how inflation is impacting our top patriots, and we need your input.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE on December 6th. |
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That’s why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bfc785d3051446978088f94e77c3186c&_e=9gfuR84zZ7z2NAuw2pgzkqQ4WQN1birmKuodz6-OPDJUIiC4ZYGhWYaBGi1RCSiNvy9lu8h_23FhnmbVtCzgjIeifWxEmh70Sqa7E_cthsCaVVx7oHNkWUxPgjarrBqq2Hlj_0Hb51Krn_hbgB2-Q3Rc4PAQboymN62miwgbHR9N0SJPfn6-4mW37z2XP6d5shwuQst8SGi50YVwMIUXvKrAjo8aCBbMWOy9_axDASFBowqUS9CMrXwDxur215GelMiveGNNHR7mrGGi3pGgtgDyS-zj7z35R3TD6khXovmWFiQU7T9kvq6f7kihY-xW262hPmBo9Vd-lrbK5jAT03dBCEaBaHVt0dJmkUs24fP7m2RP8GcwcxAUTcAuX97x04eNKL5hV-7DCQOF8GmMBeClkNgWeMHGJmmtUzvvRybzAI0Ie-jsdoiUnHPZTObf)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bfc785d3051446978088f94e77c3186c&_e=9gfuR84zZ7z2NAuw2pgzkqQ4WQN1birmKuodz6-OPDJUIiC4ZYGhWYaBGi1RCSiNvy9lu8h_23FhnmbVtCzgjIeifWxEmh70Sqa7E_cthsCaVVx7oHNkWUxPgjarrBqq2Hlj_0Hb51Krn_hbgB2-Q3Rc4PAQboymN62miwgbHR9N0SJPfn6-4mW37z2XP6d5shwuQst8SGi50YVwMIUXvKrAjo8aCBbMWOy9_axDASFBowqUS9CMrXwDxur215GelMiveGNNHR7mrGGi3pGgtgDyS-zj7z35R3TD6khXovlUUt1y4BVamXEjX6ATaRJFvQxE-LZPBakc4yRooS3yEx2T6fMo5JA3aoHKgkjqaatMWcmAx4llOaRkRIFmYB3SMitjto54lQbXN1zK-hKqNfWSavP206ZOGRel_zR8HUYLQ4Q32QuGo90XbqCuxqtW)
We’re not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bfc785d3051446978088f94e77c3186c&_e=9gfuR84zZ7z2NAuw2pgzkqQ4WQN1birmKuodz6-OPDJUIiC4ZYGhWYaBGi1RCSiNvy9lu8h_23FhnmbVtCzgjIeifWxEmh70Sqa7E_cthsCaVVx7oHNkWUxPgjarrBqq2Hlj_0Hb51Krn_hbgB2-Q3Rc4PAQboymN62miwgbHR9N0SJPfn6-4mW37z2XP6d5shwuQst8SGi50YVwMIUXvKrAjo8aCBbMWOy9_axDASFBowqUS9CMrXwDxur215GelMiveGNNHR7mrGGi3pGgtgDyS-zj7z35R3TD6khXovmivuwz72yr4z1cX0XjtJU_SPU3X6cIp_Z-PgWriojBBYnrSxMlOegWMMHkJg6A-ukJJjAYF8znGsfpAwPJAQiZX-ABqrdNTVB34DwP2aA1xprpyWjrHgSwx5ZG-HE5CGngEz-wUY9B3r5IyXoGTale)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we’d run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don’t have to pay for this new batch. **[I’m coming to you today with a simple request:_will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bfc785d3051446978088f94e77c3186c&_e=9gfuR84zZ7z2NAuw2pgzkqQ4WQN1birmKuodz6-OPDJUIiC4ZYGhWYaBGi1RCSiNvy9lu8h_23FhnmbVtCzgjIeifWxEmh70Sqa7E_cthsCaVVx7oHNkWUxPgjarrBqq2Hlj_0Hb51Krn_hbgB2-Q3Rc4PAQboymN62miwgbHR9N0SJPfn6-4mW37z2XP6d5shwuQst8SGi50YVwMIUXvKrAjo8aCBbMWOy9_axDASFBowqUS9CMrXwDxur215GelMiveGNNHR7mrGGi3pGgtgDyS-zj7z35R3TD6khXovlRtMU3aZzfK0_U8c1FOGLfsW7cN91NGp4JWP0mPm7UF61CiYn2N39x02Mgx5Psr2jAhT1WU2cuIyNFwTH3bRPtT8ClDdCsU0ojxf6m_MeeRuBi3gsGDcU2hqxOyRf5_R5Q5Vh3JLX7hhfttaafnMCX)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=bfc785d3051446978088f94e77c3186c&_e=9gfuR84zZ7z2NAuw2pgzkqQ4WQN1birmKuodz6-OPDJUIiC4ZYGhWYaBGi1RCSiNvy9lu8h_23FhnmbVtCzgjIeifWxEmh70Sqa7E_cthsCaVVx7oHNkWUxPgjarrBqq2Hlj_0Hb51Krn_hbgB2-Q3Rc4PAQboymN62miwgbHR9N0SJPfn6-4mW37z2XP6d5shwuQst8SGi50YVwMIUXvKrAjo8aCBbMWOy9_axDASFBowqUS9CMrXwDxur215GelMiveGNNHR7mrGGi3pGgtgDyS-zj7z35R3TD6khXovnAeg-yjXKKNFwcJ3o5qDbOU0hPjjS2J-ixjOra3kDV0qU7ZveVujBYpbO9JbtCzJ6ucGQE46mwtkYJYFuC-ndfFjEUKGd3YRpLBGAkbBt2CMlPmjDAxBxYKPPW_jv4yOjg83OpIWqyeZl2QRinTlKS)**

To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we’d run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don’t have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Wouldn’t you be furious?
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r) **
---

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61961265:Ji4QiYGN9:m:1:3317145305:CC77F335FDEBBB2A3D3164A2EB9A264E:r)

These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: This is the horrific reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960395:JGt5iYGmN:m:1:3373497171:ACCDF56A08A1344005B7457A4AD9E1E4:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956866:6ME0iYGNs:m:1:3372576248:34EC94345E034E6EC48D0AFFB8830A44:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956866:6ME0iYGNs:m:1:3372576248:34EC94345E034E6EC48D0AFFB8830A44:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956866:6ME0iYGNs:m:1:3372576248:34EC94345E034E6EC48D0AFFB8830A44:r)**

clean_body: | Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to pay for them. Please let me explain: It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters. In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race. But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th. Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election. Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - our Senate race. That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date. We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Joe Kent
subject: Please help fund the recount!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Recount Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Here in Washington State, the election officials are still counting ballots and our campaign is still hard at work fixing many our supporter ballots that were rejected. The margin is well under 1% and shrinking fast.
We are preparing to request a recount but, unfortunately, our campaign will have to pay for it.
Will you help us raise the approximately $80,000 we need by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ONWxxUPAiC6uwfVwbBdnPg/M892whZrz4ZZGpnM7jFOWk3w)?
We believe a recount would be worthwhile given the narrow margin, the documented technical issues in the signature verification process, human error, and the precedent of elections being overturned in our state following recounts.
The maximum contribution to the recount fund is $2900 (or $5800 for married couples). Anything you can spare would help us.
We have a VERY short timeline to raise the money - just a few days. Please give whatever you can afford at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ONWxxUPAiC6uwfVwbBdnPg/M892whZrz4ZZGpnM7jFOWk3w).
Thank you and God Bless,

Joe Kent
PS - With the margin less than 1%, please help raise money to pay for the recount. We have just a few days to raise the money. Donate today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/ONWxxUPAiC6uwfVwbBdnPg/M892whZrz4ZZGpnM7jFOWk3w).

Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Recount Fund.

[Unsubscribe]

clean_body: Raphael Warnock raised $52 million in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff. We’re going to need the support of every con | BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million Fellow American, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff. That's a lot of money. He significantly outraised us. Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle! There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate. Please, Fellow American, let me know you're still with us. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

body:
On this blessed Thanksgiving holiday weekend, we bring you news you need to know (Black Friday Edition)

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/df080bde411a/alert-must-read-news-for-illinois-conservatives?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

THANKSGIVING WEEKEND EDITION

ICYMI: our latest news and top stories from this week. Sign up today (https://www.illinoisreview.com/switching-plans-wizard?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) so that you never miss our breaking news!

Power vs. The People: The Arrogance of the IL GOP Despite Massive Losses (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/power-vs-the-people-the-arrogance-of-the-il-gop-despite-massive-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

As public calls for Tracy’s resignation grow amongst everyday, hardworking Republican voters and activists – internally, some state central committee members are quietly lobbying for a leadership change at the top. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/power-vs-the-people-the-arrogance-of-the-il-gop-despite-massive-losses.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
