Vargas: If Ariz., Ill. GOP Want to See Wins, Leadership Must Change (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

If Arizona and Illinois Republicans want to start winning again — it’s going to take an entirely new leadership team. Until that happens, Republicans better get used to being in the minority. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-if-ariz-ill-gop-want-to-see-wins-leadership-must-change.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot Stripped My Press Credentials – I'm Suing to Get them Back (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-stripped-my-press-credentials-im-suing-to-get-them-back.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It’s been three months since Chicago Mayor Lightfoot stripped me of my Chicago media credentials. I’m still waiting for a federal judge — an Obama appointee and former co-worker of Lightfoot — to restore my First Amendment rights. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-stripped-my-press-credentials-im-suing-to-get-them-back.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/chicago-mayor-lori-lightfoot-stripped-my-press-credentials-im-suing-to-get-them-back.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Pritzker's Latest Pandemic Proclamation Declares "Supreme Executive Power" (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/pritzkers-latest-pandemic-proclamation-declares-supreme-executive-power.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Back in September, President Biden declared that “the pandemic is over.” However, Gov. Pritzker is making it clear through his continued use of executive orders and proclamations that the pandemic remains a public health emergency, and he’s declared all 102 counties a disaster area – again. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/pritzkers-latest-pandemic-proclamation-declares-supreme-executive-power.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/pritzkers-latest-pandemic-proclamation-declares-supreme-executive-power.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Elon Musk Removes Ban, Restores Trump's Twitter Account (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/breaking-elon-musk-removes-ban-restores-trumps-twitter-account.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
“The people have spoken.” After a Twitter poll that generated more than 15 million votes in less than 24 hours, the 45th President of the United States of America is back on Twitter. Click to read more. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/breaking-elon-musk-removes-ban-restores-trumps-twitter-account.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/breaking-elon-musk-removes-ban-restores-trumps-twitter-account.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** Vargas: It's Time for IL GOP Chairman
Don Tracy to Resign, Now (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/vargas-its-time-for-il-gop-chairman-don-tracy-to-resign-now.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=25f7c607df-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_25_03_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-25f7c607df-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: For about the price of a cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter,

First, I want to personally thank you for being a part of our movement to
transform the Democratic Party from the inside out.

Back in 2018, we recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to run for Congress
and helped her campaign defeat an entrenched incumbent.

Then we did the same thing with Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020. And
this year, we helped power both Summer Lee and Greg Casar to victory just
a few weeks ago. We’ve grown the progressive caucus in Congress and it’s
all been possible because of our grassroots supporters.

As we prepare to recruit more progressive champions to run against
establishment Democrats we need to make sure we have the resources to go
up against right-wing super PACs like AIPAC — who spent heavily against us
this cycle.

For about the price of a cup of coffee, you can help sustain our work for
the long haul. Will you begin a monthly donation of $5 today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121953?refcode=em20221125-26241&t=1001&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL ]→ Yes, I will start a $5 (or more!) monthly contribution to help
recruit and elect more leaders like AOC, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121954?refcode=em20221125-26241&t=1002&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL ]→ No, but I can make a one-time gift today to support Justice
Democrats.

Justice Democrats as an organization began after the Bernie Sanders 2016
campaign because we all saw how hungry people are for meaningful change.

We’re sick and tired of establishment Democrats who don’t actually fight
for working people and are too scared to push for policies like a Green
New Deal and Medicare for All.

Together, with your support, we will continue to achieve great victories
and elect more progressive fighters to Congress. But our work takes a lot
of resources year round. Which is why we need your sustaining support.

We have recurring contribution fundraising goals to reach before the
beginning of 2023 and if 204 folks each start a $5 recurring contribution
in response to this email then we would immediately reach our goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121953?refcode=em20221125-26241&t=1003&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL ]Please start a monthly contribution of any amount that you can afford.
Even $5 a month is a great way to support our work and help us plan for
the future.

Thank you so much for any amount that you’re able to contribute.

With gratitude,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221125-26241-footer&t=1006&refcode2=26241_1203867_lFhWiL&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=26241%2E1203867%2ElFhWiL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

I cannot do this without your generous support. | Thank You, Kari Lake Candidate for Arizona Governor * Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

• **NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short. **

**So much is at stake, folks. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans currently have a three-seat majority. Still, there are a few seats left, and we're in very good shape in most to all of them, including CA-13, where the count could go for another week. The more we can narrow the margin of the Republican majority, the more leverage we have. Can you support a fair count for this important race?
body:
Election count alert

| | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. So let's make doubly sure Gray has the resources to COUNT EVERY VOTE AND WIN THIS RACE!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Adam Gray so he can pay the staffers and lawyers who are the watchdogs in this effort. Let's take this seat and have an even better Thanksgiving!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf63baff-6299-48fc-961e-60e9489997cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**

We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. _**

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: DEFEND OUR MARINES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960379:60aLcYGNR:m:1:3374012347:E2EAD81F9CB02430B9442143488569B7:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Sponsor 10 yard signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956876:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956877:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956878:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956879:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956880:6CECcYGgN:m:1:3372944669:303A91534D3BF1C88AF995D1835B9ECA:r)

To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. clean_body: Raphael Warnock raised $52 million in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff. We’re going to need the support of every con | BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million Fellow American, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff. That's a lot of money. He significantly outraised us. Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle! There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate. Please, Fellow American, let me know you're still with us. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: A runoff, and a couple scenarios:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.
| | | I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me.

It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the final balance of power in the Senate. **[The one where you chipped in an extra $5 to help push our candidate over the finish line.](https://go.dscc.org/go/11061?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221125-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221125-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8842%2E9716520%2Emg8I_y)**

And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We expanded our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great.

**But there's another way it could happen.** Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter.

You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. [**Click here to chip in $5 right now -- and to sweeten the deal, the next 100 gifts will be QUADRUPLED!**](https://go.dscc.org/go/11061?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221125-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221125-ChuckSchumer-RunoffCoffeeRF-Pros-sl1&akid=8842%2E9716520%2Emg8I_y)

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first 100 gifts received from this email will be QUADRUPLED:

We've all seen the polls. Georgia is statistically tied. In races this close, _every little thing_ makes a huge difference. Every door knocked. Every call made. **And yes, every dollar given.**

But with the runoff just days away, we can't afford to wait. Your donation won't be going toward some far off future program. **It will be put to use first thing tomorrow.**

**[So please, chip in $5 or more right now. You have my word that it will be put to _good use_ and it will have an _immediate_ impact. clean_body: I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me. | | | I have two thought experiments for you. Stay with me. It's the morning after the Georgia Senate runoff. You rub the sleep out of your eyes. Brew some coffee. Look at the news to find out what happened in that race -- the one that was going to determine the final balance of power in the Senate. And wouldn't you know, the headlines are fantastic. We did it! Sen. Warnock won! We expanded our Senate majority. Your coffee has never tasted so great. But there's another way it could happen. Morning. Coffee. News. But in this scenario, you didn't pitch in that $5. You were feeling pretty good about our chances, after all. The headlines jump out at you: "Democrats lose in Georgia. Herschel Walker unseats Raphael Warnock." Your coffee has never tasted so bitter. You still have time to choose between these two outcomes -- but not much. We're running out of time to invest the resources that will mobilize voters -- so don't wait for tomorrow. Don't even read the rest of this email. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first 100 gifts received from this email will be QUADRUPLED: | | | | | We've all seen the polls. Georgia is statistically tied. In races this close, every little thing makes a huge difference. Every door knocked. Every call made. And yes, every dollar given. But with the runoff just days away, we can't afford to wait. Your donation won't be going toward some far off future program. It will be put to use first thing tomorrow. Thanks, Chuck P.S. Want a great coffee tip to stay warm as fall turns to winter? Add a dash of cardamom. Want another one? name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: This is the horrific reality 😮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960420:6lEYJYGJN:m:1:3369487795:FB54BC89A3A94267CF8126819C036855:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956881:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956882:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956883:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956884:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956885:6k3lJYGNU:m:1:3373497171:1C06617AEFEB91C308664B65797B764D:r)

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: December 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE on December 6th. |
---
Fellow American - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Fellow American, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That’s why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5d7fd3b2283246778d1eb5589ab1c5d3&_e=JbjQf1b9SSOUuZ_7ko-aju9y5IM5cVfSTumeg_pKMxNEtfJy1MhPDEEJd7ved8IKLUZ-jLTGdjf_YT79z_IC4AoGw2TblBgPnrE-HXYZ1aj8efkKODx1adxrlFdTSiqWrwhw1TA7iRdRu74opgoa6FRMVNd91VDot6A3qqu0LDe9N9q2rl9P7qIk5qt8E34RDHTID-pwH7ioVFqN-Gr4Ct2cY2X_w790wwm5JWpdH5_OBcR-fMqZXir883Jy9ZHwdEpdoVaOTGG9OmmFDOlIAas30zcbWIT38_RxUJlIo7u0BTMYdadeO88SZw7jroLzAsORnOS4PYzYIkhtDwmkUkoVthf24LjpwkM3OqzY_OtrU_3T_dfhJqnmOQRd3XBmXBy1tjVqZ0ZAAafn4mW-jiqArxnu5sRGmwKPBdDm40X37uYfKn8Pa9EUYiy0BGSG)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5d7fd3b2283246778d1eb5589ab1c5d3&_e=JbjQf1b9SSOUuZ_7ko-aju9y5IM5cVfSTumeg_pKMxNEtfJy1MhPDEEJd7ved8IKLUZ-jLTGdjf_YT79z_IC4AoGw2TblBgPnrE-HXYZ1aj8efkKODx1adxrlFdTSiqWrwhw1TA7iRdRu74opgoa6FRMVNd91VDot6A3qqu0LDe9N9q2rl9P7qIk5qt8E34RDHTID-pwH7ioVFqN-Gr4Ct2cY2X_w790wwm5JWpdH5_OBcR-fMqZXir883Jy9ZHwdEpdoVaOTGG9OmmFDOlIAas30zcbWIT38_RxUJlIo7v878zJOWcCL6xGAo2KICbb7yjq9u7ZWKp4Fob-YeS9YUuTw7PEcwXw2H1rYlUjpTk6dPPCKdF0rD0ULqiI2cqkRKazygqLE8IhvzsEV_of0uaAIQ7aDh0ptPD9Ni4lc3MRtqMibEyXPwKWXOGcizi9)
We’re not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=5d7fd3b2283246778d1eb5589ab1c5d3&_e=JbjQf1b9SSOUuZ_7ko-aju9y5IM5cVfSTumeg_pKMxNEtfJy1MhPDEEJd7ved8IKLUZ-jLTGdjf_YT79z_IC4AoGw2TblBgPnrE-HXYZ1aj8efkKODx1adxrlFdTSiqWrwhw1TA7iRdRu74opgoa6FRMVNd91VDot6A3qqu0LDe9N9q2rl9P7qIk5qt8E34RDHTID-pwH7ioVFqN-Gr4Ct2cY2X_w790wwm5JWpdH5_OBcR-fMqZXir883Jy9ZHwdEpdoVaOTGG9OmmFDOlIAas30zcbWIT38_RxUJlIo7sgxZ5NQxuAaN9eSl_PDe_Mp52tuMeJjXHDIvKOmeZwmECh2uZxG01LK8aW2KsEOyUSBZyu6GpctXBQLXRVXBskkJ4rc68lYzyEi-tMVDH3aTfHbYGD0OvvQeTg36lkIRIjQ2nKnlDmR9mqWtO3ps_j)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we’d run out of them. clean_body: We only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE on December 6th. | Fellow American - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to pay for them. Please let me explain: It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters. In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race. But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th. Fellow American, we only have 11 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election. Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - our Senate race. That’s why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date. We’re not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. To do that though, These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over. When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we’d run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don’t have to pay for this new batch. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: re: the power of this grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. | |
---
Derek, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters -- and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents showed me the meaning of hard work -- and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. It’s that very spirit that led me to become the first in my family to earn a college degree. And now, it’s the lesson I’m taking with me into the runoff election for Georgia’s Senate seat. **But I can’t do it alone, Derek. We’ve all got to roll up our sleeves and get to work.** I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. It’ll take a tremendous amount of resources, especially when we’re short on time. That’s why I’m asking: **Will you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help keep this seat blue, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats across the nation? We can’t win without the support of this grassroots team.**
** ****[ DONATE: $10 ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xwBCZMAaDvd1Lam6EYqj7XRdG5M6LP6xDMqCMZezRAcCxwfSZjeM5gkbEpGdNOBRUjsFEfoKVWtPcyPe2D-x0D4i6FE-97xpczWm6cnyaL3bau-ZtT3_eUedFhecbqdfxZOWczokDqfhxAoXNpsDSGPd2qExhMldHkJ0KZoX6edx6LxiAIYeoQ1bdtFgsVNAnqo-IRo_pmwRXO0qIZANljYWt6aOgiCuACWHIBdxMlWJSmpRKEzzpSgeAc_1mtYQ-x51nxeiz_wpmqSDiPRlRmfqYgqk-VvkX7n1Tjyk1_ehQ4f6RlVXU51jaBCytIM9nwnE7Z8NlyFPO6xtaIom2GK8YaKkwhzXNoxpJXt9rSVj0doqkLO283kdWRmbjoP-iU-fjqbooX6KP8-s9K8WZVu_Stx7D4QDVtAd4_D4Y8Pg/3rg/8r0Jr9QaRJOCF2-fUtzucw/h0/ivtbLCX49JC0kacnW6i2wku0tk5VXDHEXUjEyKX9pmY)

clean_body: We have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. | | Derek, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters -- and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents showed me the meaning of hard work -- and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. It’s that very spirit that led me to become the first in my family to earn a college degree. And now, it’s the lesson I’m taking with me into the runoff election for Georgia’s Senate seat. But I can’t do it alone, Derek. We’ve all got to roll up our sleeves and get to work. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. It’ll take a tremendous amount of resources, especially when we’re short on time. That’s why I’m asking: Will you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help keep this seat blue, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats across the nation? We can’t win without the support of this grassroots team. I’ll be honest, Derek: This fight won’t be easy. Until last year, Georgia hadn’t elected a Democratic senator since 1996. And you didn’t just elect one -- you elected two of us! That is the power of this grassroots team. This grassroots team has spent the year supporting Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide and it has paid off. Now, I need your support. In a race this close, every single vote counts. Thanks for all you do, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Send a yard sign to a Georgia voter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 12 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956901:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956902:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956903:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956904:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61956905:6MbFPYGGN:m:1:3374012347:5410C761CE0E236F8617CCC68BF2DAC0:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

body:

Our team is fighting hard to ensure every LEGAL vote is counted - but we cannot do it alone.

This is where you come in, Peter, this is the final push, and I can't do this without you.

[**Volunteers across Arizona are making sure that our voice is heard and our ballots are counted, but the fact is many Republican ballots may be invalid.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61957861:6q7pfYGNi:m:1:3350876382:3E635C7727B020483FC4FD2F19963892:r)

| | It’s Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee President Jessica Post here. We secured major victories for state Democrats this month, all thanks to our grassroots supporters. Let me give you a recap: In the midterms, state Democrats:
* Flipped four chambers to Democratic control

* Won every must-hold Democratic target

* Won every must-hold Democratic target

* And protected the veto power of Democratic governors in two key states

**In fact, it is the first time since at least 1934 that the party in power has not lost a single state legislative chamber during a midterm election year!** We were able to make history by making targeted investments in campaigns, knocking on nearly seven million doors, and getting organizers on the ground to turn out voters. **These wins will impact millions of people’s lives and create a strong Democratic foundation in state legislatures for years to come.** But our next fights are right around the corner: **We have a key special election for a seat in the Virginia Senate coming up on January 10th – _a top target for us to win in 2023._** We're already laying the groundwork to win, but without you, we risk starting these campaigns behind. [Please, can you rush $7 (worth $21 impact!) or whatever you can afford now to ensure state Democrats are ready for the hours and days ahead>> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wAg9gBPS4rAJB5A4gY_FK-AYic2eIvl6chyi6ybjW5VFlFiURGlUOe2UADTQxE9veP8_kyvK-I0ipLx8M8nWxXZ3KPidF6xymY7UIDl_PDYMSDXnrEHyhOQsa4jKGP-TdDxV6Nc1y7GcIaU1zloHJ3YDnXSVsQa1cZgDjnaOby3Ek6xxQCqnMgA0jpoKXtN2npjq_Qqr092TNlDFKfVkKkH2abFzEh_bCMufP13inMRX7xsMdkY4GCvVv-MpdiwRdA7UgRCTLmvszO5rA_rc2N8A5FnIeiSFdY689kbSL145uPLhjbuznFHaYPvWsZiEZ6VRrkw-bcsqV1Ct-7M75DIwN4CZaq9T6JfTNrk4RTpiU0VkljXkCvdC3fIDhUY8s/3rg/1A9NE0opSpi4RvG66JW5qA/h0/rqC_T6c9GthiL80uxZ9HZWLwgy7nT5IcZCIBX3IVUW8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, this makes me SICK.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960429:6sRlMYGNp:m:1:3370555685:FCE4A9BE8706CD0246C99C0618A451E0:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Horrific reality the troops in our military are facing 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960431:6eVOMYGSN:m:1:3371220873:56BAEC669FA8CD95ACE60C54B78ABBF8:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: for family & country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- With the holiday weekend upon us, I want to take just a moment to share how thankful I am to lead a movement of so many good, reasonable, and inspiring people who are bound by love of country, rather than political party. Thank YOU for making it all possible through your extraordinary moral support -- and for being on the ground floor of this movement with us. It's amazing to think how far we've come in the last 22 months, and that we're just getting started. Our humorous holiday-themed video from last year has been seen by millions of people (we appreciate everyone who helped share it!), and we're rolling out a new version of it this year: [](https://www.country1st.com/a_holiday_from_toxic_tribalism?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=2) While this video is meant to be funny, I know many are facing difficult situations at their tables this year due to the toxic political culture enveloping our country. Please know that you are not alone, and that this movement is working overtime to make things better. And in that spirit, I hope you'll consider us when holiday shopping this year -- we have some great new items and old favorites in our shop. All proceeds go toward defeating toxic politics and those who peddle it. | [](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=3 "Shop Country First") [Shop Country First](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=3)
---
Happy Thanksgiving from Sofia, Christian and me and the entire Country First team! We're blessed to have you as part of this family, and to call ourselves Americans.
Country First,

Adam
| [](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=4 "Support the Mission") [Support the Mission](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=4)
---
| [](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=5 "Wear the Cause") [Wear the Cause](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=thanksgiving1_nd&n=5)

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, I need your help to protect everyone of our service members
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960424:6isnnYGaN:m:1:3371812801:F128D0F6A14A33485DC1AC34A1B6EB1A:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

| | | | | Peter, | [**_We're only one day away from early voting beginning in Georgia so we can return Senator Warnock to Washington! It costs about a dollar to get a voter to the polls in Georgia! Can you help today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a776821-2aa2-4c91-add0-c0642a93b45d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tomorrow, Saturday, November 26th, early voting starts. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. _** **_Healthcare, abortion rights, further action on regulating guns, paid family & medical leave, a $15 min wage & preventing a potential climate catastrophe are just some of the many issues on the ballot in Georgia. _**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Georgia Senate runoff voting starts tomorrow!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf039507e-516b-4d8f-900b-c865d70f2bcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | **_We must get his back--first, make a plan to vote tomorrow if you live in Georgia!-- by rushing him the resources to turn out voters once the early voting period begins. As we told you previously, it costs .98 to vote in Georgia. Our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters!_** [**_Can you join us in rushing Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so he can bank early votes and put this race out of reach for Republicans--like Herschel Walker--who'll try to cheat and overturn a loss?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13612a8c-ace4-4713-b7f5-f7a01c9e7e5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much BlueAmp Community! We're so close to the finish line.**

Cliff

That's a lot of money. He significantly outraised us. Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle! There are just 11 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate. Please, Fellow American, let me know you're still with us. name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: Peter, the DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61960413:J9nvBYGNx:m:1:3372576248:39DB8F2421984CBF26833C05BD76302C:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Extremely thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| Friends — **I have a lot to be thankful for this year.

I am thankful for time with family and friends this Thanksgiving.**

I am also incredibly thankful for all of you. **Together, we unseated a 13-term incumbent and brought a new generation of leadership to Southwest Ohio.**

When I decided to do this, I didn't know how it would end, but I believed you all would show up. And you did. To everybody who knocked on doors, made phone calls, wrote a check, and voted: I do not have the words to express my deep gratitude.

**I am honored and grateful for the opportunity to serve, and excited to get to work for our children and families here at home.**

From our family to yours, a belated Happy Thanksgiving. 🙏 💙 🦃

Thank you,

Greg Landsman
Congressman-elect, OH-01
---

clean_body: | Friends — I have a lot to be thankful for this year. I am thankful for time with family and friends this Thanksgiving. I am also incredibly thankful for all of you. Together, we unseated a 13-term incumbent and brought a new generation of leadership to Southwest Ohio. When I decided to do this, I didn't know how it would end, but I believed you all would show up. And you did. To everybody who knocked on doors, made phone calls, wrote a check, and voted: I do not have the words to express my deep gratitude. I am honored and grateful for the opportunity to serve, and excited to get to work for our children and families here at home. From our family to yours, a belated Happy Thanksgiving. 🙏 💙 🦃 Thank you, Greg Landsman Congressman-elect, OH-01 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201 www.landsmanforcongress.com to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Click here to .

body:

body:
we need your input
| | **_ATTENTION:_**
Drop everything and read this huge breaking news: | **“Legal Efforts to Disqualify Trump from Holding Office Again Intensify After He Announces 2024 Presidential Campaign”** | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)
---|---
[57 rapid responses needed: Should Congress BAN Donald Trump from public office?!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)

[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)
[I'M NOT SURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)
Democrats in Congress have introduced legislation to BAN Donald Trump from holding office after inciting his deadly insurrection.

This is a HUGE move! If they’re successful, they would use the constitution to keep MAGA Donald Trump out of the White House – _forever!_

But we’re reaching out to our strongest and most engaged Democratic supporters – _we need to know what you think:_

[57 rapid responses needed: Should Congress BAN Donald Trump from public office?!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=11&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-ban-trump/?source=VPP_20221125_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=12&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI)

Thank you,

– VPP

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5503%2E878179%2EIosDgI).**
